economic_notes: Wahta Economic Development GP Inc. and Wahta Economic Development LP accounted for on modified equity basis. WEDLP generated net gain of $177,819 in 2023. First Nation holds investments of $34,284,526 market value managed by Scotia Asset Management. Defined contribution pension plan offered to all employees with First Nation matching up to 5.5% of wages.
notes: Fiscal year 2023 (ended March 31, 2023). Wahta Economic Development GP Inc. and Wahta Economic Development LP are accounted for on the modified equity basis (not fully consolidated), classified as GBEs. Accumulated surplus includes $3,288,953 in accumulated remeasurement gains recognized in 2023 following adoption of fair value accounting; investments portfolio had significant unrealized gains. No schedule of remuneration for Chief, Council, or staff was included in the provided financial statements. ISC funding per note 10 is $3,885,713 total federal; ISC confirmation amount was $4,059,982 before adjustments. Total government transfers calculated as Provincial ($1,034,523) + Federal ($3,885,713) = $4,920,236. OSR = $10,271,616 - $4,920,236 = $5,351,380. No long-term debt disclosed. Contingent liability: ISC has guaranteed member loans of $477,769.
